title: Tungsten arsenal
description: Mod that adds tungsten, and weapon from it!
body:
Tungsten Arsenal brings a new level of firepower to your Minecraft world by introducing a full set of weapons crafted from the ultra-durable metal: Tungsten. Stronger than iron, tougher than diamond, and deadlier than netherite, tungsten is the ultimate resource for players who crave serious combat power.

Features:

New Ore: Tungsten – Found deep underground, rarer than diamond, and smelting longer. Time to dig deep!

Tungsten Weapons – Scythe, rapture sword, and Sickle. (it will get new weapon)

Balanced Progression – Designed to fit smoothly into the vanilla gameplay loop while offering late-game power.

Whether you're a dungeon-crawler, PvP warrior, or just want to swing a powerfull weapon at creepers. Tungsten Arsenal gives you the weapon to dominate.

**[creator note]** Hey guys, i am rewriting the mod, and i add plushes. So, i want you all, to have your own! Text me on discord: _andreiloz_ or on email _andrejlozovoj12@gmail.com_
